calls.why: On 7-16 he hit the 8-rep ceiling on both feeder sets (135x8, 155x8) so those earn +5 lb, and the two top sets sat at the 6-rep floor (165x6, 170x6) so I ask for one more rep before adding weight there.

He already cleared 157.5x10 (range ceiling) on 7-20, so the app's cross prescription just hands back what he beat; I step the top set to 165 (next 7.5 machine notch) and start the ramp at weights he owns.
The app repeats 7-16 verbatim at 12 reps, the floor of a 12-15 slot; weight is fine, so I bank reps toward the middle of the range instead of copy-pasting.
Sitting mid-range at 8/8/9 in an 8-10 slot, so I hold 35 and push each set one rep toward the 10 ceiling before the dumbbell jumps to 40.

The app's repeat prescribes 10.5x12 three times but on 7-16 he only got 10.5x10 then had to DROP to 7.5 for the last two sets — I correct the fantasy down to what he actually holds: one push set at 10.5 and honest 7.5 back-offs.
The app's cross prescribes 54x12 twice, but on 7-20 he only managed 54x10 there — that overstates him, so I correct the top set to a reachable 54x11 and ramp through 52.5 which he took for 12.
He hit the 12-rep ceiling of a 10-12 slot on his only logged set at 57.5 on 7-16, so I earn the next loadable notch (60.5) and expect reps to settle back into range.
He cleared both fixed-15 sets at 25.5 on 7-21, so on a rep-capped slot the only way forward is weight — step to the next real pin at 27.5.
